content: Create RecipeDetailScreen full implementation (header w/ back + menu, metadata, nutrition card, ingredients, steps, action area)
Wire wizard final save to navigate to /my-recipes/:id instead of /my-recipes
Wire 'Editar receta' to /my-recipes/edit/:id (note: completed-recipe edit still shows ComingSoon per existing wizard behavior)
Add 4 PostHog events: recipe_detail_viewed, recipe_added_to_library, recipe_proposed_to_catalog, recipe_deleted
Smoke test + testing_agent_v3 verification covering all 10 checklist items
